summary: MURAMASA is recruiting strike UAV operators, squad commanders, navigators, and combat team engineers, while Rubicon Center operators destroyed 191 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs on April 13 and 110 on April 11, with over 2,000 intercepts using FPV drones against 80+ UAV models. Russian forces used FPV drones to kill two soldiers on motorcycles assaulting Ukrainian positions and to eliminate a Russian soldier who attempted to flee after feigning surrender. Ukrainian troops survived an FPV attack in the Kostiantynivka direction, aided by a drone detector, and employed electronic warfare to force a drone landing. Separately, XDOWN unveiled the Small Tactical Unmanned Drone (STUD), a 2.7 kg, 300 km/h, 64 km range FPV drone with an 800 g payload, featuring a Switchblade-style foldable design.
